species: N‐terminomics profiling of naïve and inflamed murine colon reveals proteolytic signatures of legumain
tissue: N‐terminomics profiling of naïve and inflamed murine colon reveals proteolytic signatures of legumain
cell_type: we report that legumain is activated within colonocytes and macrophages of the murine colon
disease_state: it is upregulated in models of acute experimental colitis

age: Acute colitis was induced in 8–10-week-old male mice
